agent_instruction: Use drift_fix_plan(max_tasks=20) to get prioritised repair tasks. Start with batch_eligible tasks for maximum throughput — apply the same fix to ALL affected_files_for_pattern, then verify the batch with a single drift_diff(uncommitted=True). Use drift_nudge for quick directional checks between edits.
done_when: accept_change == true AND blocking_reasons is empty
